topic: Open LLMs are great because they are more than enough for many workflows and offer free use and 100% privacy
generated_post:
Yes, Gemini 3.0 is amazing. But for many tasks, it's too expensive and simply overkill.

Don't sleep on Open LLMs which you can run locally on your device.

Open LLMs like Gemma 3 can be run locally via Ollama, LocalAI, or LM Studio, offer 100% privacy, and are more than capable enough for most use cases and workflows.
